deliverables.description:
"MVP Release with Sky Ecosystem transparency reporting information that can be shared publicly. 
* RWA reporting flow (without e2e encryption & comparison views) 
* DAO finances (advanced stage) 
* DAO teams (at least core unit + ecosystem actor profiles) 
* DAO work (projects & roadmaps in early stage) 
* Endgame overview (latest updates & budget insights) 
* New homepage with at-glance insights on various DAO aspects - Finances, governance, Teams, and Work (reskin implemented)."
deliverables.title: MVP release of the Sky Ecosystem transparency reporting information.

deliverables.description:
All the global Achra pages are wireframed, designed, reviewed, and approved by the RGH team. 

The global pages are the ones that are not displayed in the context of a specific network. For example: the global list of workstreams as opposed to the workstreams belonging to a particular network.

* Achra landing page (achra.com)
* Achra use cases overview (achra.com/use-cases)
* Achra use cases details (achra.com/use-cases/{use-case-slug})
* Workstreams overview (achra.com/workstreams)
* Services overview (achra.com/services)
* Services details (achra.com/services/{service-slug})
deliverables.title: Design Global Pages

deliverables.description:
The Network Builders and Governance pages on Achra are wireframed, designed, reviewed, and approved by the RGH team. 

The Network Builders page is the list of Builders specific to a given network. Similarly, the Governance page shows Governance information for a specific Network. 

* Achra Network Builders page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/builders)
* Achra Network Governance page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/governance)
deliverables.title: Design NW Buiders/Governance

deliverables.description:
The Network Workstream pages on Achra are wireframed, designed, reviewed, and approved by the RGH team. 

The Network Workstream pages show an overview, as well as the specifics, for Workstreams within a given Network. This includes the roadmaps, milestones, deliverables and key results for a given Workstream.

* Achra Network Workstreams page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/contribute)
* Achra Network Roadmaps page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/roadmap
* Achra Network Roadmap page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/roadmap/{roadmap-slug}
deliverables.title: Design NW Workstreams

deliverables.description:
The Network Finances pages on Achra are wireframed, designed, reviewed, and approved by the RGH team. 

These pages show an overview, as well as specific details, of finances within a given network. This includes the Network Finance Home page, the Builder's Finance page, the Builder's Account Snapshot, and the Expense Report.

* Achra Network Finance page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/finances)
* Achra Network Builder Finances page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/builders/{builder-slug}/finances)
* Achra Network Builder Finances Expense Report page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/builders/{builder-slug}/finances/expense-report
* * Achra Network Builder Finances Account Snapshot page (achra.com/network/{network-slug}/builders/{builder-slug}/finances/account-snapshot
deliverables.title: Design NW Finances

deliverables.description:
All the global Achra pages are accessible in the development environment and approved by the RGH team. 

The global pages are the ones that are not displayed in the context of a specific network. For example: the global list of workstreams as opposed to the workstreams belonging to a particular network.

* Achra landing page (dev.achra.com)
* Achra use cases overview (dev.achra.com/use-cases)
* Achra use cases details (dev.achra.com/use-cases/{use-case-slug})
* Workstreams overview (dev.achra.com/workstreams)
* Services overview (dev.achra.com/services)
* Services details (dev.achra.com/services/{service-slug})
deliverables.title: FE Dev Global

deliverables.description: Frontend implementation of Builders & Governance modules.
deliverables.title: FE Dev NW Builders/Governance

deliverables.description: Front-end interface for Network Workstream has been implemented.
deliverables.title: FE Dev NW Workstreams

deliverables.description: Frontend for Network Finances page is functional.
deliverables.title: FE Dev NW Finances

description: The Scope of Work model defines a structured plan for executing contributor work; on top of deliverables and roadmaps with milestones it now also includes projects as budget anchors for project based budgeting.

roadmaps.description: Make Achra the official transparency reporting platform for Powerhouse, SKY, and its Prime Agents as required by the Atlas. The expectation is from launch day onwards, all the network administration teams, the project/product managers, the builders and the finance operators are using Achra and the associated Connect apps on a daily basis to keep track of work and finances.
roadmaps.title: Achra MVP Roadmap

title: Scope of Work
